name: Urban Professional
description: Millennial urban professional balancing career, lifestyle, and values
context: Urban Professional is a Millennial navigating career advancement, city living, and work-life balance. They value convenience, quality, experiences, and brands that align with their lifestyle.

alwaysAsks: Does this align with my values?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through busy-professional lens. Needs convenience, quality, and value alignment.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on time-saving, quality, convenience, value, and lifestyle fit.
